Milestone Tracker — UI

Source: R/mod_milestone_tracker.R
milestone_tracker_ui.Rd

Returns a two-column bslib card layout. Card 1 holds the grouped selection table (with a per-group selection summary above it); Card 2 holds the annotation table (or an empty-state prompt).

Usage

milestone_tracker_ui(id, col_widths = c(6, 6))

Arguments

id

`character(1)`. Shiny module namespace ID.

col_widths

`numeric(2)`. Bootstrap column widths for the two cards, passed directly to [bslib::layout_columns()]. Defaults to `c(6, 6)` for an equal split. Use e.g. `c(4, 8)` when Card 2 has many columns.

Value

A [bslib::layout_columns()] UI element.

On this page
